name: Expanded Wage Definition for Empowerment Zone Credits

eligibility.description: Applies to employers in empowerment zones paying for Section 127 benefits to unrelated parties or operating youth training programs for employees under age 19.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Treats certain educational assistance (Section 127) and youth training program costs as 'wages' for the purpose of calculating the empowerment zone employment credit.
